subject: feat(icon): replace document icon with "dm" lettermark
body:
Old icon was a detailed document on dark navy — unreadable at 28px in the
header and looked like a broken image. New icon is a bold "dm" lettermark
in cyan on transparent background. Works in both light and dark mode.

Removed unused PWA icons (adaptive-icon, splash-icon, icon.png) — this
is a static portfolio site, not a PWA. Bumped header display to 32px.

Tags: ui, branding, icon
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: header-styling
Semver: patch
